description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a modern design, featuring a combination of wood and white finishes. The front side has a large glass panel door that reveals several interior shelves, ideal for displaying or storing items. Below the glass door, there are two drawers with subtle handles, providing additional enclosed storage space. The sides and top of the cabinet are finished in a natural wood texture, while the front is predominantly white with a clear glass section. The cabinet stands on small, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its sleek and minimalist appearance makes it suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: Tall, narrow cabinet with a glass-fronted door, wood sides, and two lower drawers. Modern, minimalist design with white and wood finishes.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from the side, showing a plain, flat white panel with wood trim visible at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: This view displays the full wood-textured side of the cabinet, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: The front view reveals a large glass door with interior shelves and two drawers at the bottom, framed by white and wood finishes.
description_view_3: The opposite wood-textured side is visible, mirroring the side in view 1, with no openings or features.
